title: Assistant Store Manager - Landmark Group India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Landmark Group India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Landmark Group India in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Group India:
Landmark Group India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Group India!
